headline: How Consolidated Edison’s (ED) US$776 Million Equity Raise Has Changed Its Investment Story
summary: Consolidated Edison, Inc. recently completed a follow-on equity offering of 7,000,000 common shares, raising about US$775.67 million at US$110.81 per share with no stated discount. This fresh equity capital, coming alongside brighter analyst earnings estimates and sentiment, highlights how investors appear to support the utility’s funding approach for its regulated operations. With improving analyst sentiment around its recent equity raise, we’ll explore how this financing shapes...

headline: Is Consolidated Edison (ED) Fairly Priced After Its Multi‑Year Share Price Climb
summary: If you are wondering whether Consolidated Edison is fairly priced at its current level, you are not alone, especially with utilities often seen as income and stability plays. The stock last closed at US$112.28, with returns of 4.6% over 30 days, 12.3% year to date, 12.0% over 1 year, 37.3% over 3 years and 88.8% over 5 years. This gives a useful backdrop before comparing that price to underlying value. Recent headlines around regulated utilities and power infrastructure have kept investor...
